review_title: Low effort, full featured mobile app solution for Shopify stores
description: Mobiloud just works for us. It requires no maintenance or management on our side and the team have been very responsive and helpful. They are leaning into supporting Shopify stores with push notifications and app-only offers.
author: Damien S.
pros: Simple and effective mobile app solution for Shopify stores. We don't have to run a separate dev pipeline for our mobile app and everything we deploy to our Shopify store is instantly available in the app as well. A fraction of the cost of a custom native app and far more features than drag & drop Shopify app builders.
cons: Not quite a snappy as a native app, but this is to be expected for a wrapper app solution. Also need to log in more often than a typical native app.

description: It has been positive. The team at Mobiloud are easy to work with, responsive and helpful. The app is performing well with only a few glitches which were resolved quickly.
author: Jamie B.
pros: Mobiloud allows us to have complete functionality of our mobile site in an app. It also allows us to have seamless updates across our website and app since there is no customization required in the app environment which saves us a lot of time.
cons: Response times to inquiries can sometimes be slow but they do get back to you every time. It would be nice to have a live chat option.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good for years, now horrific. Stay away.
description: Mobiloud offers a canvas app, which is essentially just wrapping your existing website in a browser that loads as an app. When you talk to them, they will assure you that any website will work the same way in their app as it does in any browser. It seems reasonable that this would be the case. But, trust me, that is not the case. While things went well for several years, my relatively simple website (WooCommerce) no longer works in their app. I have had nothing but problem after problem for the past year. In some cases, when I got nasty, they gave me a few months for free, but never willingly. At present, some (not all) customers cannot add products to the shopping cart. Mobiloud had (and still has) no idea why this particular bug exists. They are doing their usual runaround with me where they want me to help them debug their code and they want to continue to charge me even though their app is not working. They claim it is fixed and wanted to charge me another year today but never once offered to reach out to our customers who are experiencing the problem to actually test to see if it is fixed. As a clue of how out of touch they are, until recently, they were offering me a service for free where I advertise the app as a popup on every page of my site. I had to point out to them that it makes no sense to advertise an app that is not even working. I have not been able to advertise the app for the past year because it causes so much customer service activity. These guys have no idea about business or customer service. Stay far away. I don't know if there are other canvas app companies but I would look for another.
author: Greg H.
pros: For several years, the app was fine. It is not OK now.
cons: For the last year, the app has been full of bugs and support was useless.

description: MobiLoud is very responsive and got us to market in the short timeframes we have established (over the holidays, no less)
author: Michael P.
pros: We needed something fast - without the hassle of a dev team to support it and with MobiLoud we got all of that on short timeframes.
cons: None, we were thrilled with our experience from beginning to end.

description: Good communication and quick action. Fairly smooth process getting set up and customized. Any changes I want to make they are quick to make happen.
author: Nina A.
pros: They are quick to respond about any issues that arise and handle everything related to the app. Always happy to answer my questions and make any changes requested.
cons: There are some continued issues with notifications that keep happening. The links from emails don't work to open in app but from what I understand it is something to do with email, not the app. Just wish there was a workaround.

description: Mobiloud gave us a quick path to APPS For Apple and Android mobile users. The development effort and support allowed us to check the box for APPs.
author: Randy H.
pros: Complete support for Apple and Google registration at an affordable fee. Quick support for bugs software issues.
cons: We prefer immediate phone support in addition to email with scheduled calls but we think the overall support was good.

review_title: This service made our app easy to publish.
description: The onboarding was fast, and they helped us get our app published with Apple and Google. Whenever we had any questions, they were quick to help answer them.
author: Doug H.
pros: I liked that the Mobiloud team walked us through the entire process and helped us until our app was published. They made it super easy.
cons: So far, I've liked everything. The platform and people are great. Nothing major that we dislike so far.

review_title: Excellent Service from Start to Finish — Flawless Experience
description: What stood out most was their support and communication — it was incredibly easy to get assistance whenever we needed it, and their team was always responsive and helpful. They made the whole journey stress-free, and we always felt confident knowing we were in good hands. If you’re looking for a company that combines technical expertise with reliable support and great customer care, I highly recommend them.
author: nick B.
pros: We had an excellent experience working with this app company. From the very beginning, the process was smooth, straightforward, and professional. They really took the time to understand our needs and delivered an app that not only met but exceeded our expectations.
cons: If I had to mention a “con,” it would only be that I honestly can’t think of one. Everything went smoothly, and the results speak for themselves.

description: great experience so far. been using their platform for almost 2 years now. very happy with this choice
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Seamless Web-to-App Sync , quick app publishing, we went live within few days on both app store and play store. support is great, they helped us with every step and still helping us on promoting or apps to increase downloads
cons: As a WebView-based app, it won't match the speed or smoothness of fully native apps, but this is something we've decided to go with.

description: Overall, my experience as the project manager for our mobile app, which is serviced by MobiLoud, has been positive. I truly feel that MobiLoud products and services are turn-key, providing seamless mobile app resources to sync our website with our mobile app for convenient online training.
author: Louis W.
pros: I like the fact that the onboarding and ongoing support have been positive and consistent. Their service has been time-saving, helping us to launch and maintain our mobile app in both the Apple Store and Google Play Store.
cons: I am unsure whether I've forgotten where the client's dashboard is located to manage some of the app's features, or if it no longer exists after launching. The one con is not seeing a dashboard from the Mobiloud account page.

description: We're extremely happy with the team from MobiLoud, both in helping our team get up to speed, and also in the assistance with the app store submission processes and maintenance updates.
author: Tim T.
pros: We love how easy it is to update our content and key pages using mobilouds interface and our WordPress website.
cons: I wish we could update more of the branding like the splash screens and logos without having to go through a re-submission process,but I realize that is not the fault of mobiloud.I also think the navigation icons functionality could be improved. There's no media library of my old uploaded icons (that we switch back to frequently) making it hard to manage link changes on the nav bar at times.

review_title: An important piece to elevate a concept
author: Lauren M.
pros: We partnered with Mobiloud to realise a need to help consumers access regularly updated sports information wherever they needed it. The benefit of a mobile application with push notifications allowed us to provide that in a way that is customised to our client. [sensitive content hidden] and his team have been accommodating and considerate of our specific requests throughout the development journey. We can happily recommend the Mobiloud service.
cons: Missing option to tailor home screen for multi-tenant sites.

review_title: So simple: Wordpress site to app
description: We have searched for a long time and tested various providers. It was always the case that the information was good, but important crucial functions could not be used or were missing. Our website is based on Wordpress and we wanted to add an app without much programming. Especially the transfer of external links is a problem for many providers, but for us the most important feature. With Mobiloud we didn't have these problems and if something didn't work, it was usually our mistakes, but they could be fixed quickly. I would recommend every user to involve the Mobiloud team in the development of their own app right from the start. This definitely saves time and nerves. In the end, we now have a great app that is fed with data from our website. That's how it should be.
author: Thomas K.
pros: We need a system that converts our wordpress site into an app without losing functionality. This can be done quickly and without much programming.
cons: There are no points we could write here. If we have a problem, the very competent support will help us immediately and find a solution.

description: Are overall experience with MobiLoud software It is just amazing from the pricing to the ease of service on ongoing support.
author: Dick L.
pros: This software is amazing. It's everything we were looking for to do what was needed for our business. MobiLoud is great to work with from setting up the software for us to work with it, to the ongoing support. We can't say enough about there team members on how fast the response time is on working with us to get exactly what we were looking to get out of a app with all the functions we need for our customers. The ease of the software is just amazing and well thought out for us to use. We can't thank them enough for everything!!
cons: None: everything works as they say it would.

review_title: Great for the SMB looking to spin up an MVP
author: Braxton H.
pros: The ability to get a product shipped within a few weeks was imperative, we selected MobiLoud for a variety of reasons, but the ease and simplicity of getting our website converted to an app and put into the app store on a tight timeline proved to be a simple task for the MobiLoud team.
cons: Additional features should be added to Canvas and the design portal.

description: Great. Fast, great communication and explanations.
author: Reed H.
pros: Easy to use and attentive to communication.
cons: International. Be nice if they were in USA

review_title: Great solution for a low budget startup!
description: Great customer service, very fast and efficient in getting our apps build and launched on time, and very consistent. It's great that everything on the mobile app side is handled by MobiLoud, even with frequent updates from Apple and Google. Overall very happy and satisfied.
author: Thomas M.
pros: We really loved working with the MobiLoud team to quickly build and launch or mobile apps for our corporate wellness and fitness platform.
cons: The apps work and function well, but at the end of the day you can still tell it's a mobile browser, which, is no fault of anyone's.

description: Overall the experience was very positive and I've been very pleased with our decision to use Mobiloud for our mobile apps. I would certainly use them in the future and would recommend them to others.
author: Harry B.
pros: I really liked how well the Mobiloud team was able to take the ideas that we had and make them a reality for our app. They listened and understood our needs, and then executed very well.
cons: One area that could have used improvement was overall communication during the process. The process for getting apps approved i've learned is long, but while it was taking place I didn't always feel like I knew what was going on step by step.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I loved the easy setup and the ability to preview the app before buying it.
cons: It's not tremendously flexible in what it does, but if you want to get your content out in app form, it's perfect.

review_title: They Got The App Up And Running and KEEP It Running!
description: I has been an easy experience with MobiLoud.
author: Pete M.
pros: I like that anytime there is an issue with Apple, like a certificate needing to be updated, I can simply tell MobiLoud and they take care of it. It's hands off to me.
cons: If there was something I didn't like, MobiLoud would fix it.

review_title: Incredible value, top-notch support and ease of use
description: Mobiloud is a small dedicated team so sometimes processes took a bit longer than expected to be completed.
author: Muhammad M.
pros: [SENSITIVE CONTENT] at Mobiloud made the entire process incredibly simple. He sent detailed tutorials for all of the tangential processes that needed to be completed to get our app published and in compliance on both the Apple and Google app stores. The price of the service is fair and an incredible value for the level of personalized support received. We intend to partner with Mobiloud for as long as the need arises.
cons: This was an app launching platform/service not a piece of software. It was much more service-oriented and aside from the fact that the process took a bit longer than it may have with a larger firm, we were very happy.

description: Mobiloud has been very reliable and a great option for mobile app development.
author: Christian W.
pros: MobiLoud offers push notifications and a seamless setup. You are able to get your app up and running very fast.
cons: The cost and gaps in customer support can be challenging at times.

description: Great experience. They solved a real problem for our company with relatively low cost and great service.
author: Pedro P.
pros: Mobiloud was easy to use and, for a much lower price than what it would have cost to develop the apps in-house we were able to get custom apps for our newly launched project. The service is personal and customized, you are always dealing with real people, who are also friendly and helpful.
cons: Some of the customizations (especially ones requiring use of third-party providers, like notifications) require getting acquainted with external documentations, and hand-on research and technical implementations, which contrasts with the rest of the experience, which is very easy and mostly no-code.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The team behind MobiLoud is really helpful and was always able to solve any issues we had. I would definitely recommend it to anyone who needs a quick solution for getting their WordPress site on the mobile app market.
author: Kevin T.
pros: The setup was incredibly easy and only took a short amount of time to be distributed to the public.
cons: There is an inherent simplicity when working with site wrappers. This is not necessarily a negative specifically towards MobiLoud. Any templated app solution will have a lack of customization since they are intended to work for a multitude of sites with varying type of content.

description: We have had a great experience with MobiLoud. Great customer service. Would highly recommend.
author: Dave B.
pros: Super easy to integrate with a wordpress website. If we did have any problems, MobiLoud answered our emails and made changes quickly.
cons: With the many wordpress updates sometimes there were features that needed to be updated.
